name: Mushroom Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt half the butter in a pan and fry the vegetables for a few minutes to soften.
2. Stir in the sherry and cook until all the liquid has evaporated.
3. Season and let cool completely.
4. Add remaining butter, blend everything together in a food processor until smooth.
5. Spoon into a dish and garnish with parsley.
6. Serve with toast.
